title: Flatline Ops 30mm Rifle Scope Mount ADI/ACI Ring System for Scopes
description:
Flatline Ops Hitch Hiker is a durable rugged mount that attaches an ADI/ACI to your scope. Easily attaching to your scope the Hitch Hiker will give the advantages of the ADI or ACI, taking the guessing out of uphill or downhill precision for long-range shooting. This is a simple tool for hunters to use in mountainous terrain to obtain their distance to target, corrected for gravity. Make sure to grab one of these before your next hunting trip! PLEASE NOTE: ACI/ADI is not included.

Flatline Ops 30mm Rifle Scope Mount ADI/ACI Ring System for Scopes

Flatline Ops Hitch Hiker is a durable rugged mount that attaches an ADI/ACI to your scope. Easily attaching to your scope the Hitch Hiker will give the advantages of the ADI or ACI, taking the guessing out of uphill or downhill precision for long-range shooting.

Key Features

  • Hitch-Hiker Mounting System Fits 30mm
  • Material: 6061-T6 Aircraft Aluminum
  • Finish: Black Hard Anodized
  • Hardward: Stainless Steel (Included)
  • Easily Attaches an ADI/ACI to Your Scope

Product Specifications

  • MPN: FOHH30MM
  • UPC: 060886515760
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 30 mm

This is a simple tool for hunters to use in mountainous terrain to obtain their distance to target, corrected for gravity. Make sure to grab one of these before your next hunting trip!

PLEASE NOTE: ACI/ADI is not included.
